---
title: "Soil Health Economic Decision Tool"
date: 2025-04-15
author:
  - name: Jeffrey Hadachek
    url: https://jhadachek.github.io
page-layout: article
---

[{{< fa arrow-left >}} Back to Extension/Outreach](/wisconsinag/)

Soil health practices are costly investments with complicated and uncertain payoffs. This decision-support tool helps farmers and conservation professionals understand the economics of practice adoption and allows users to adapt inputs to their unique context.

::: {.pub-links}
[{{< fa arrow-up-right-from-square >}} Open Tool](https://jhadachek.shinyapps.io/CoverCropDecisionTool/){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}
:::
